config.toolsmithsharper.title: Toolsmith Sharper Configuration
config.toolsmithsharper.max_uses.tooltip: Number of hits before basic sharpening wears off. (Default: 32)
config.toolsmithsharper.max_coating_uses: Number of hits for oil coatings (Fire, Poison, etc.). (Default: 10)
config.toolsmithsharper.max_whetstone_us: Number of uses for a whetstone tool). (Default: 3)
config.toolsmithsharper.whetstone_use_ti: Time in ticks it takes to sharpen a tool (40 ticks = 1 second)
config.toolsmithsharper.xp_cost.tooltip: XP levels consumed per sharpening action. (Default: 1)
config.toolsmithsharper.repair_percentag: Amount of item durability restored when sharpened. (Default: 10%)
config.toolsmithsharper.damage_multiplie: Extra attack damage granted to sharpened weapons (0.25 = +25%). (Default: 0.25)
config.toolsmithsharper.speed_boost.tool: Flat speed added to tools mining efficiency. (Default: 2.0)
config.toolsmithsharper.effect_duration_: Duration of potion effects for base oils. (Default: 100)
Duration of potion effects for extended oils. (Default: 200)
config.toolsmithsharper.effect_amplifier: Level of potion effects for base oils (0 = Level I). (Default: 0)
Level of potion effects for amplified oils (1 = Level II). (Default: 1)
config.toolsmithsharper.fire_seconds_bas: How long targets burn with base Fire Oil. (Default: 4.0)
config.toolsmithsharper.fire_seconds_amp: How long targets burn with amplified Fire Oil. (Default: 8.0)
config.toolsmithsharper.vampire_heal_bas: Health restored with base Vampire Oil (1.0 = half heart). (Default: 1.0)
config.toolsmithsharper.vampire_heal_amp: Health restored with amplified Vampire Oil. (Default: 2.0)
message.toolsmithsharper.volatile_oil: This oil is too volatile for gathering tools! Use it on weapons.
message.toolsmithsharper.already_honed: This item is already perfectly honed with this oil!
message.toolsmithsharper.already_luck: This item is already infused with a superior or equal luck !
command.toolsmithsharper.set_use_time: [Toolsmith Sharper] Whetstone Use Time set to : %s
